creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
The build errors in bug #279162 and #279164 are getting more difficult for me to pin down, but they seem to be more ccache-related [1] than FreeBSD-specific. I can't seem to reproduce these failures anymore, but was able to at time of filing. I'm using an entirely new system now and a lot of time has passed, however. Builds pass for me using ccache (3.x) a couple times over.

[1] https://bugs.gentoo.org/933368
